title: Wholesome Spanish Cod Ceviche
description: A briny, silky ceviche that marries fresh cod with a subtle rum glaze, cured in salt and lemon, for a low-fat indulgence. The dish is served chilled and pairs wonderfully with whole-grain bread or fresh corn tortillas.
instructions: Dice cod into 1 cm cubes and place in a non-metal bowl.
Whisk lime juice, lemon juice, white wine vinegar, rum, and sea salt until salt dissolves.
Pour the citrus mixture over the cod and stir gently to coat all pieces.
Add black pepper, red onion, cilantro, and olive oil, mixing to combine.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 30 minutes to cure the fish.
After 30 minutes, check that the cod has a firm texture and a slightly opaque surface, indicating proper curing.
Transfer the ceviche to a chilled serving dish and garnish with a few extra cilantro leaves.
Serve immediately with thin corn tortillas or crusty whole-grain bread.
